summary: V54.9 Sacred Geometry Engine Testing Complete. All 15 backend API tests pass. All frontend Sacred Geometry features verified: PHI constant (1.618033988749895), FIB_DEPTH_STEPS (9 Fibonacci-spaced values 0→1), phiExtrusion function (φ-ratio scaling), goldenSpiralPoints (8 points), seedOfLifeCircles (7 circles), getFibBreathPhase (Fibonacci breathing). All 5 spatial pages tested: Crystals (HOLLOW_EARTH), Games, Soundscapes, Breathing (AIR), Meditation. Avatar3D diamond crystal form visible. AvatarBadge shows Fibonacci-spaced depth indicator (non-uniform widths). ProximityItem uses φ-ratio extrusion with correct opacity falloff (1.0→0.15).
context_for_next_testing_agent: V54.9 Sacred Geometry Engine fully verified. Avatar3D renders diamond crystal form with Golden Spiral trail particles. AvatarBadge shows Fibonacci-spaced depth indicator (flex values: 1.85, 1.85, 3.7, 5.5, 9.2, 14.8, 24, 38.8). ProximityItem uses φ-ratio extrusion: collision opacity=1, far opacity≥0.15 (INTENTIONAL per Sacred Geometry design). All spatial pages working: /crystals (HOLLOW_EARTH), /games, /soundscapes, /breathing (AIR), /meditation.
